concerns.text: The plan identifies a 'BLOCKING GAP' where no verified dataset contains the required AM process parameters (laser_power, scan_speed, layer_thickness) and mechanical properties (yield_strength, ductility). The research.md explicitly states: 'The available verified datasets... do not appear to contain the required AM process parameters.' Proceeding with a pipeline that assumes a valid dataset will be 'manually provided' or 'discovered later' renders the automated implementation infeasible as written. The plan must either identify a specific, verified dataset that matches the schema or revise the scope to use available data.

The 'Assumptions' section states: 'The public datasets (Zenodo AM-Machine-Learning, HuggingFace Materials Project, UCI Alloy Properties) contain the specific variables required...' This assumption is contradicted by the research.md findings which found no such verified source. Relying on an assumption that the data exists when the research phase has already flagged its absence makes the project plan unexecutable without a new data discovery phase.
